AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class ImageUtils

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Provides utilities for loading ribbon icons and contextual help resources for Revit UI elements.

public static class ImageUtils
Inheritance
object
ImageUtils
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

This class supports three icon sources:

  • WPF Pack URIs for resources embedded as Resource content.
  • Embedded manifest resources via GetManifestResourceStream(string).
  • File-based icons in the user's Revit add-in AppData folder (theme-aware naming).

Theme handling uses UIThemeManager on Revit 2024+; otherwise it defaults to light theme.

When an icon cannot be resolved, a "Missing32.{theme}.ico" fallback icon is used.

Methods

AddIcons(List<RibbonItem>)

Applies icons, tooltips, and contextual help to a set of ribbon items based on the current theme.

public static void AddIcons(List<RibbonItem> allRibbonItems)

Parameters

allRibbonItems List<RibbonItem>

All ribbon items to update.

Remarks

Icons are resolved from the add-in AppData folder using naming conventions:

  • {CommandName}16.{theme}.ico for small images.
  • {CommandName}32.{theme}.ico for large images.

Tooltips are loaded from Resources/Tooltips/tooltips.csv when present. Contextual help is applied if Resources/Help/{CommandName}.pdf exists.

GetEmbeddedImage(Assembly, string)

Loads an embedded manifest resource image as a BitmapSource.

public static BitmapSource GetEmbeddedImage(Assembly assembly, string imageFullName)

Parameters

assembly Assembly

Assembly that contains the embedded resource.

imageFullName string

Fully-qualified manifest resource name.

Returns

BitmapSource

The loaded image if found; otherwise AccoRevit.Addin.Utils.ImageUtils.DefaultLargeImage.

Remarks

If imageFullName is null/empty, this method returns AccoRevit.Addin.Utils.ImageUtils.DefaultLargeImage. Any exceptions are swallowed and also result in returning AccoRevit.Addin.Utils.ImageUtils.DefaultLargeImage.

LoadPackImage(string, string)

Loads a WPF image from a Pack URI pointing to a resource embedded in an assembly.

public static BitmapImage LoadPackImage(string assemblyName, string relativePath)

Parameters

assemblyName string

The short assembly name hosting the resource.

relativePath string

Relative path to the resource within the assembly.

Returns

BitmapImage

A frozen BitmapImage loaded from the Pack URI.

Remarks

Uses OnLoad so the stream can be released immediately. The returned image is frozen to allow cross-thread use and reduce UI overhead.

ToggleImage(UIApplication, string, string)

Updates (toggles) the icon on a ribbon button found on the "Toggle" ribbon tab.

public static void ToggleImage(this UIApplication uiapp, string buttonName, string ico)

Parameters

uiapp UIApplication

Revit UI application.

buttonName string

Ribbon button name to match.

ico string

Base icon name (without theme suffix and extension). The resolved file name will be {ico}.{theme}.ico.

Remarks

This method enumerates ribbon items on the "Toggle" tab and updates the first Autodesk.Revit.UI.RibbonButton whose Autodesk.Revit.UI.RibbonItem.Name matches buttonName (ordinal comparison).

The icon is resolved from the user's AppData add-in folder.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown when uiapp is null.
